Amendments2015—Par. (1). , inserted “and includes the descendants of individuals so defined” before period at end.Pub. L. 114–95, § 6004(e)(1)Par. (2). , added par. (2) and struck out former par. (2). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The term ‘Alaska Native organization’ means a federally recognized tribe, consortium of tribes, regional nonprofit Native association, and another organization that—Pub. L. 114–95, § 6004(e)(2)“(A) has or commits to acquire expertise in the education of Alaska Natives; and“(B) has Alaska Natives in substantive and policymaking positions within the organization.”

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015

children.heading: Alaska Native
children.label: 1 Alaska Native
children.text: The term “Alaska Native” has the same meaning as the term “Native” has in and includes the descendants of individuals so defined.section 1602(b) of title 43

children.label: A
children.text: an Indian tribe, as defined in , that is an Indian tribe located in Alaska;section 5304 of title 25

children.label: B
children.text: a “tribal organization”, as defined in , that is a tribal organization located in Alaska; orsection 5304 of title 25

children.label: C
children.text: an organization listed in clauses (i) through (xii) of , or the successor of an entity so listed.section 619(4)(B) of title 42
